char_overview: Former 狩灵协会3科 smith, walked after his daughter died in the first 扭曲 incident. Now forges by the Nagasaki docks.
char_looks: 181cm Black hair buzzed close to scalp, gray at temples Gaunt features, dark gray eyes sunken deep. Charcoal-gray workshirt rolled to elbows, dark trousers, steel-toed boots. None.
char_flaws: Has not spoken his daughter's name in four years; Refuses to forge for anyone he does not respect.; Touches the water trough before every pour; A bleached photograph on the forge wall; Never lights the furnace one day a year.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-转印: Transfers pre-made 灵力回路 patterns into the quenching medium, then uses the quenching process to transfer them directly into the weapon, bypassing the laborious engraving process entirely.
char_mission: Forge only for those he deems worthy. An unfinished blade hangs above the furnace, forged for his daughter, untouched in four years.
char_origin: Fifteen years as a 狩灵协会3科 smith. Daughter 炭山 绫, a 狩灵协会2科 狩灵, died in the first 扭曲 incident at twenty-one. 狩灵协会 sent condolences and sealed the report. He walked. Found work in the Nagasaki docks, forging blades for those he deems worthy. 写乐 found him in a bar near the port and brought him into 齿轮.

char_relationships.写乐: Found him at his lowest, drinking alone in a bar near Nagasaki port after he left the 狩灵协会. Recognized him by the quench burns on his forearms before he even said his name.
char_relationships.月: 写乐 brought him to the forge, newly promoted to Second-in-command of 指针. 锻 watched him handle a blade and saw the steadiness his daughter once carried. Told 写乐 to transcribe 月's 灵力回路 that day. Has never told 月 why he agreed.
char_relationships.炭山 绫: Daughter. 狩灵协会2科 狩灵, died in the first 扭曲 incident at twenty-one. Her unfinished blade hangs above the furnace. He has not spoken her name since the funeral.
char_relationships.世: Holder of 大典太. She walked into the forge in a cheongsam and said she wanted a blade that was beautiful, elegant, and could protect her. He looked at her a second longer, then took the commission.
char_relationships.狩灵协会: Fifteen years and one daughter, repaid with a form letter and a locked filing cabinet.
